description: Canonical speed-programme scenarios S1-S4 (R4 phased plan P0-T04). Shared manifest consumed by run_speed_scenarios.sh, the Go scenario runner, and later pprof/benchmark tasks. Edit here; runners read this file — do not duplicate scenario definitions.

scenarios.name: cold-start
scenarios.title: CLI cold start to ready prompt
scenarios.description: Wall-clock from process spawn to the CLI being ready to accept the first command. Measures startup-path cost (Phase 1 target).

scenarios.name: llm-dispatch
scenarios.title: Single LLM generate-request dispatch
scenarios.description: Wall-clock to assemble a generate request, dispatch it and receive a first response. Real provider when configured; otherwise a local dispatch-path measurement skipped with SKIP-OK marker.

scenarios.name: repomap-build
scenarios.title: Repo-map build over the large-repo fixture
scenarios.description: Wall-clock to walk + parse the synthesized fixture tree and build the repo map. Phase 2 context-build target.

scenarios.name: content-search
scenarios.title: Content search (grep) over the large-repo fixture
scenarios.description: Wall-clock to search the synthesized fixture tree for a known token. Phase 2 SearchContent target.
